RUFAS.routines.field.soil.carbon_cycling package

Submodules

RUFAS.routines.field.soil.carbon_cycling.carbon_cycle module

class RUFAS.routines.field.soil.carbon_cycling.carbon_cycle.CarbonCycling(soil_data: SoilData | None = None)

Bases: object

cycle_carbon(rainfall: float, temp_average: float, field_size: float) → None

Main routine for carbon cycle.

Parameters

rainfallfloat

Amount of rainfall on the current day (mm)

temp_averagefloat

Average temperature on the current day (mm)

field_sizefloat

Size of the field (ha)

RUFAS.routines.field.soil.carbon_cycling.decomposition module

class RUFAS.routines.field.soil.carbon_cycling.decomposition.Decomposition(soil_data: SoilData | None, field_size: float | None = None)

Bases: object

decompose() → None

Determines decomposition effect for each layer and temperature effect.

Returns

None

RUFAS.routines.field.soil.carbon_cycling.pool_gas_partition module

class RUFAS.routines.field.soil.carbon_cycling.pool_gas_partition.PoolGasPartition(soil_data: SoilData | None, field_size: float | None = None)

Bases: object

partition_pool_gas()

Main routine to update variables associated with gas partitioning in all layers.

Notes

This method applies all the gas-partitioning sub routines to each layer of soil that is present in the soil data object.

RUFAS.routines.field.soil.carbon_cycling.residue_partition module

class RUFAS.routines.field.soil.carbon_cycling.residue_partition.ResiduePartition(soil_data: SoilData | None, field_size: float | None = None)

Bases: object

add_residue_to_pools(rainfall: float) → None

Adds residue to pools.

partition_residue(rainfall: float) → None

Main routine to updates attributes by using static methods, this method should only be called (by the field/ field manager) on the day that a cut, harvest, or kill operation occurs and should be called after that operation.

Parameters

rainfall: float

amount of rain (mm)
